title: ProtocolSettings
description: Protocol-specific delivery settings for the subscription. The applicable properties depend on the 'protocol' field of the subscription.

contentMode.description: CloudEvents content mode for HTTP delivery. 'structured' places all event data in the body; 'binary' maps attributes to headers.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include when delivering events over HTTP.

method.description: HTTP method to use when delivering events. Defaults to POST.
